description: Alibaba Cloud DashScope MCP: Qwen chat, embeddings, and model discovery on your own account.
name: io.github.nirholas/alibaba-cloud

environmentVariables.description: DashScope API key. Create one at https://bailian.console.alibabacloud.com/ → API Keys.
environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default chat model id. Options: qwen-max, qwen-plus (default), qwen-turbo, qwen-long.
environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Default embedding model id. Defaults to text-embedding-v3.
environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_EMBED_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Custom DashScope endpoint. Defaults to international (dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com).
environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'cn' to use the China endpoint (dashscope.aliyuncs.com). Ignored if DASHSCOPE_BASE_URL is set.
environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_REGION

title: Alibaba Cloud DashScope — Qwen
